description: Root container for a systematic review. This is the primary object that contains all review data, stages, literature records, and artifacts. Every RevAIse document should have a Review as its top-level object.

conforms_to.description: Protocols or guidelines this review or record declares conformance to

funding_sources.description: Sources of funding for the review

literature_records.description: Literature records managed in this review

review_abstract.description: Abstract or summary of the review

review_keywords.description: Keywords or tags for the review

sections.description: Narrative prose sections of the review report

stage_outputs.description: Outputs and logs produced by the review stages

updated_at.description: When this review record was last updated

title: revaise
